mapper.sql: id, supplier_id, product_id, stat_date, views, orders, sales_amount, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supplier_product_metrics (supplier_id, product_id, stat_date, views, orders, sales_amount, created_at) VALUES (#{supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{productId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{statDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{views, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orders, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{salesAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

INSERT INTO supplier_product_metrics (supplier_id, product_id, stat_date, views, orders, sales_amount, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.productId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.statDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.views, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.orders, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.salesAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM supplier_product_metrics WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM supplier_product_metrics WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
DELETE FROM supplier_product_metrics WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supplier_product_metrics (supplier_id, product_id, stat_date, views, orders, sales_amount, created_at) VALUES (#{supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{productId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{statDate, jdbcType=DATE}, 0, #{orders, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{salesAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE orders = orders + VALUES(orders), sales_amount = sales_amount + VALUES(sales_amount)
